ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., 1896 Summer Olympics) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was held */,
  "host_nation" TEXT /* Host nation(s) where the game was held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the game */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the game */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of game (Summer or Winter) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was held */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the official logo for the game */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the official website for the game */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Name of the official mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the country (e.g., USA, GBR) */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "national_anthem_url" TEXT /* URL of the national anthem */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., Football, Athletics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sport */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the sport's icon */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or birthplace of the sport */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Men's Football, Women's 100m) */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the event belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the event's icon */,
  "record_holder" TEXT /* Name of the current record holder */,
  "record" TEXT /* Current record for the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country that won the medal */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the medal was won in */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the medal was won in */,
  "medal_type" TEXT /* Type of medal won (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete who won the medal */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (if applicable) */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the medal (e.g., 1 for gold, 2 for silver) */,
  "ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the medal ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country that participated in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the performance was in */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the performance was in */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Wins */,
  "d" INTEGER /* Draws */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Losses */,
  "gs" INTEGER /* Goals scored */,
  "ga" INTEGER /* Goals against */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the country in the event */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score or time */,
  "qualifying_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of qualifying rounds participated in */,
  "best_performance" TEXT /* Best performance (e.g., fastest time, highest score) */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
